examples: Sister Lychen herself, with pale, veiny skin and a bony face, invited him in to share the cookies.
The creatures themselves are veiny, scary, and bordering on the grotesque, with Satan-worthy roars.
What everyone else thinks it means: the veiny system that anchors a tree or other plant into the ground.
The rest of the world is reduced to a disparate series of veiny streaks.
Undercooking presents a different set of challenges, keeping the Brussels sprout's flavors concentrated inside its veiny leaves and thick root.
